description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure dressed in urban streetwear, featuring a cropped jacket over a bralette, asymmetrical leggings, and fingerless gloves. The figure wears a cap and a face mask, adding to the contemporary, urban aesthetic. The hairstyle is dramatic, with long, spiked ponytails extending from the back of the head. Footwear consists of athletic sneakers, and the figure is accessorized with wristbands and a belt. The overall build is athletic and slim, with a confident, upright posture. The materials and surface details suggest a synthetic, semi-matte finish typical of digital character models.
description: A stylized urban adult pedestrian in streetwear with a cap, mask, cropped jacket, and dramatic spiked ponytail, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cropped jacket, bralette, face mask, cap, and asymmetrical leggings with visible accessories.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long, spiked ponytail, cap brim, and the layered look of the jacket and leggings.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full length of the spiked ponytail, the back of the jacket, and the belt detail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail, cap, and the layered clothing profile.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with cropped jacket, bralette, asymmetrical leggings, and fingerless gloves
